message:
feat(abi-tests): expand fenv_abi test coverage from 11 to 19 tests

Add 8 new tests covering exception flag isolation, rounding mode
edge cases, environment save/restore with exceptions, and flag
get/set round-trips for comprehensive fenv.h ABI verification.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
